## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss client progress, address challenges, and align on next steps across multiple projects.](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Critical focus on DeepGram strategy: Need for AI apps content, higher-intent pieces, and following successful HockeyCode recipe (300+ signups, high traffic on /guides)](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Clerk content issues require immediate attention due to investor relationships; technical review process needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [New clients (HyperExponential, Relay) in early stages; focus on deep dives, CMS setup, and security documentation](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Emphasis on communicating comprehensive content strategies to clients, including clusters, assignments, and quantified opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Topics

  - [HockeyStack, Alex.ai, Understory: Focus on high-intent content pieces and audience-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

  - [Ambient: Content well-received; adjusting product positioning based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

  - [Okta: Positive client feedback; ongoing production work on SDR docs](https://fathom.video/share/HbZbGYy5YfWcuk6rE2c_BSbz73kwt3bU?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
